sampleQuery.query: employees with expertise in Azure AI and machine learning

results.title: Q1 R&D Project Summary
results.caption: The R&D team completed the data ingestion pipeline and ontology mapping phases, with active focus on machine learning model integration and Azure AI Search configuration.
results.highlights: employees with expertise in Azure AI and machine learning contributed 4 major deliverables in Q1

results.title: Azure AI Search Index Design – Employee Knowledge
results.caption: This design document defines the AI Search index schema, vector embedding configuration, and semantic search settings for the Employee Knowledge Graph.
results.highlights: Azure AI Search provides hybrid semantic and vector search over all employee knowledge assets

results.title: Employee Knowledge Ontology Design Specification
results.caption: The ontology aligns to Microsoft Fabric Ontologies and is exposed through Purview Unified Catalog for governance. It models employees, contributions, and digital assets.
results.highlights: Ontology entities expose machine learning model metadata and Azure resource identifiers

results.title: Employee Knowledge Graph – Architecture Overview
results.caption: Architecture overview presentation covering OneLake, Microsoft Graph Connectors, Azure AI Search, and the RAG engine powered by Azure OpenAI.
results.highlights: Azure AI Search indexes all extracted content with vector embeddings for semantic search and RAG

results.title: Engineering Skills Matrix Q1 2026
results.caption: Skills matrix tracking proficiency in Azure AI, Python, Power BI, and Terraform across 18 engineering team members, with 42 active certifications.
